summary: WIN-010 c5 H1 (critical) — FSF empirical-fitting factual error. EXP-220 replaces the entire detail_verdict_text (and patches the corresponding block in detail_evidence) to concede FSF = H(r)/r as valid geometric scaling (Pearson r=0.9999 verified in this run against dome V12 coord equation), then pivots to the ratio-vs-absolute-magnitude and scaling-is-generic arguments. Training-as-test, post-hoc, and triple-count pillars preserved. Verdict "Std Model Explains" unchanged. New paragraph 7 adds the 2026-08-12 nine-station out-of-sample test as a concrete upcoming discriminator. All five c5 issues (ISS-1390/1391/1392/1393/1394) resolved by the single EXP-220 patch. Please integrate and close.
